message:
Fix toolbar button click detection

Root cause: CoordinateMapper.tabbar_height was set to cell_height (~16px)
but actual toolbar is 40px. Clicks between 16-40px were forwarded to
Chrome instead of being handled as toolbar button clicks.

- Set tabbar_height to fixed 40px (matching TOOLBAR_HEIGHT in toolbar.zig)
- Fix content_pixel_height to subtract 40px toolbar from terminal height
